title: senecio bicolor subsp. cineraria
intro: Senecio bicolor subsp. cineraria, also known as Cineraria maritima, is a perennial succulent plant native to the coastal regions of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits include its potential to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. Cineraria is typically harvested and prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or topical ointment, allowing for a range of uses in herbal medicine.
